title: Malformed JSON in Exec form leads to unexpected behavior
description: Malformed JSON in Exec form leads to unexpected behaviorAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityreliabilityBugIn Dockerfiles, commands can be specified either as a single string or as a JSON array of strings. The latter is called an "exec form". However, when exec form is not a valid JSON, it will be silently treated as shell form.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Malformed JSON in exec form. Commands starting with '[' should use valid JSON syntax with double quotes (e.g., ["cmd", "arg"] not ['cmd', 'arg'] or [cmd, arg]). Malformed JSON will be silently treated as shell form, leading to unexpected behavior.
